text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One afternoon, as I head to the<n>cafeteria to eat...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: CRACK!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh NOOOOO! My tea cup has cracked<n>agaaaain!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: C-calm down. It can still hold tea,<n>can't it?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But this is the fifth one! There's no<n>way I'll be
ready in time for the tea<n>party!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Nngh... At this rate... At this rate...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
My elegant tea party with King is but<n>a distant
dream!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Look, everyone has to start<n>somewhere. I used
to break stuff all<n>the time too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I remember when I cried over a stain<n>on my skirt,
and Ryan had to console<n>me. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
See? Give it another go. I'll help you<n>till you get it
right.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
After all, I know what it's like to want<n>to get
closer to someone.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh, Dober!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Yes, yes! Please teach me the rules<n>of etiquette!
Make a dame of the ditz<n>before you!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober continues her tea<n>etiquette lesson.
However...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: CRUMBLE!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Whaaaaat?! I crushed my<n>scooooone?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
D-don't sweat it! Let's save the<n>snacks for later
and move on to<n>pouring tea...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: CRACK!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: AAAAGH! The teapot handle broke<n>off!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
W-we'll just glue it back on! Once<n>it's repaired,
we'll try again...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Despite their valiant efforts, time<n>passes without
much progress...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Sniff... I can't believe it's alreadynight, and I still can't even pour asimple cup of tea!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
This is terrible. Absolutely dreadful. I<n>trained hard
so I could keep my<n>prince happy, but...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: But my princessly right hand is toounruly!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ahaha...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But this just proves how hard you're<n>working to
make your dream come<n>true. Don't blame
yourself. Besides...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I seem to remember a certain<n>someone stressing
the importance of<n>working towards something?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ah!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: The most important thing is thedesire to improve yourself. It'sall about working toward becomingyour ideal self!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
If you're ever stuck in a rut, I'm<n>certain we can
push through it<n>together with guts and
determination,<n>just like we did with that boulder!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Now's the time to show off your<n>princessly guts,
don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I've been out-princessed.<n>This gives me
no choice but to...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: HAI...YAH!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Scale any walls that get in my way!<n>Just like you
did before!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
There's no time to waste! I want to<n>recapture
that feeling, so I'm off to<n>give the punching bag a
thorough<n>beating!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. Just like me, huh? Now that<n>she
mentions it...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps I don't need to force myself<n>to change.
Because that moment<n>already changed me for
the better.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Looks like Kawakami helped me<n>realize
something important yet again.<n>I have to work
hard to repay her!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Aware of her own growth, Mejiro<n>Dober sets off
in pursuit of Kawakami<n>Princess.
